name: I was partly at fault for my warehouse fall in West Jordan, can I get workers comp?
description: Yes, workers' comp is no-fault; get benefits even if partly your fault.[1][4]

mainEntity.name: I was partly at fault for my warehouse fall in West Jordan, can I get workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, workers' comp is no-fault; get benefits even if partly your fault.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, workers' comp is no-fault in Utah and Idaho—you get benefits regardless of fault if injury arose from work.[1][4] It covers medical, lost wages without proving employer negligence.[1] Key factors: must occur during employment from job risks; no comparative fault reduction like personal injury.[4] Report promptly, document incident, pursue third-party claim if others negligent for extra comp.[1] Lawyer helps identify all avenues.
